start_body: Send me any media (video, photo, sticker, video circle), and I'll return a GIF. You can adjust the file limit and language in the menu below.
err_many_files: More than one file has arrived. Please send only one media item.
err_not_video: This is not a media. Please send a media file.
err_too_big_input: Input file is too large. Max: {mb} MB.
err_download_media: Failed to load media for conversion.
err_conversion: Media conversion failed. Try to upload another media file.
err_busy: Another file of yours is currently being processed. Please try again later.
processing: Processing… This may take a bit.
